title: Ice Cream Nationwide - Albany Radial 300
tagline: A 300-stop nationwide ice cream research atlas, centered on Albany and fanning outward

intent.statement: Build a nationwide ice cream atlas that starts with Albany and expands outward by radial distance while preserving rich product detail, evidence, coordinates, and photo-sourcing briefs.
intent.scope: United States ice cream, gelato, frozen custard, soft serve, paletas, shave ice, and regional frozen dessert shops. Entry ordering and ring metadata prioritize Albany outward expansion.
intent.photoPolicy: Do not use stock or generic images. This wave stores photo-sourcing briefs and only displays photos when source-attributed real product imagery is available from the actual place.

intentHistory.author: codex
intentHistory.summary: Aggregated 483 raw ice-cream research profiles into 450 deduped candidates, then selected a 300-entry Albany-radial nationwide atlas with photo-sourcing status metadata.

selection.ring: Albany core and immediate Capital Region
Capital Region outer ring and near Northeast
